'''''Gamu''''' group was a group of two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttles]] used by the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] during the [[Sepan Civil War]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces encountered shuttles ''Gamu'' as [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] staged a raid on a Ripolus supply convoy. Shuttles ''Gamu'' aided Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] in pushing back the [[Dimok/Legends|Dimok]] attackers. They were not much of a match for their Dimok opponents, so there may be chance that they were destroyed.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Gamu, Isabela|Gamu]] is a municipality in the [[Wikipedia:Philippines|Philippines]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
